title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.340 - Legislature may appropriate from fund, purposes
text:
256.340.  Legislature may appropriate from fund, purposes. — Based on reports required in section 256.330, the legislature may appropriate money from the fund to the clean water commission for specified participation in future municipal and industrial water supply storage costs incurred by project construction, including cost sharing of the project investment cost, annual operation, maintenance and replacement costs, and payment of interest on the unpaid balance.
(L. 1965 p. 389 § 5)
